title: Mail-Lite H/5 H5 - 270 x 360mm Sealed Air Mail Lite White Padded Envelope Mail Postal Bags (50 Pack)
features: 50 White H/5 Mail lite Sealed Air Envelopes
Lined with air cap barrier which is specially sealed for extra protection

description: 50 White H/5 Mail lite Sealed Air Envelopes. Mail lite envelopes is a brand known for their top quality padded envelopes. These envelopes are lined with an aircap barrier which is specially sealed for extra protection. They are manufactured from thick quality kraft paper which is naturally sourced and FSC approved. Featuring a thick laminated bubble wrap lining inserted along the inside of each envelope, this provides long lasting protection but also helps preserve items during transit. These envelopes will cushion goods even in rough travel conditions. Available in a range of sizes, mail lite envelopes are commonly used for economical simple packaging and posting.
